final:
module RefModule(
  input wire [3:0] in,
  input wire [1:0] sel,
  output wire out
);assign out = (sel == 2'b00) ? in[0] :
               (sel == 2'b01) ? in[1] :
               (sel == 2'b10) ? in[2] :
                                in[3];

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
